commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a QA Lab channel scenario contract and tests for channel/driver ids, capability normalization, standard-scenario capability mapping, and driver support assertions.

PR surface: Source +257, Tests +208. Total +465 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: the PR head's check-dependencies job reports the new contract file as an unexpected unused file, and source search shows no production import or export for it on the PR's current shape.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can make the new contract reachable from QA Lab production code or fold it into the first driver consumer so the deadcode gate passes.

target.title: feat(qa): add channel scenario driver contract
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

QA Lab has live transport scenarios for Slack, Telegram, WhatsApp, and Discord, and the next stacked PRs need to make those scenarios portable across live, Crabline, and qa-channel drivers. There was no shared contract for describing which channel capabilities a scenario needs or for validating whether a driver can run it.

## Why This Change Was Made

This adds an internal QA Lab channel scenario contract: known channel/driver ids, capability vocabulary, scenario definition normalization, standard live-transport capability mappings, and a driver support assertion. It is intentionally contract-only; it does not change current runner behavior or port any scenarios yet.

## User Impact

No end-user behavior changes. QA developers now have a small shared foundation for the follow-up Slack, Telegram, and WhatsApp scenario-porting PRs.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-qa.config.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/channel-scenario-contract.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test`
- `git diff --check -- extensions/qa-lab/src/channel-scenario-contract.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/channel-scenario-contract.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean after fixing the accepted Discord coverage and reaction-observation findings
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
